title: Guard every privileged function explicitly
description: Apply an access-control modifier to all state-changing and admin functions, and never authorize on tx.origin.
body: Use on any function that changes state, moves value, or alters configuration. Do not leave a privileged function unguarded, and never use tx.origin for authorization (it lets a phishing contract act as the user). Actions: apply a role/owner modifier (Ownable/AccessControl) to each privileged function, check msg.sender against the intended role, and make initialization functions callable once. Validation signals include an adversarial test where a non-owner call reverts and an attempt to re-initialize fails. Risk boundary: a missing access-control check lets anyone seize ownership or drain funds, and tx.origin auth enables phishing relays; treat either as a critical access-control defect requiring review.
